title: Re-stage local preview latent after an ephemeral-Pod engine restart
description: Follow-up carved off MPI-89 (leg 3 verified). A LOCAL-origin preview .latent can go missing on a remote Continue: when the user generates a preview locally, then connects to an EPHEMERAL Pod whose ComfyUI restarts for a per-model node install between staging and stage-2, the staged latent is wiped from the ephemeral input/ dir. Stage-2 falls back to 'run stage 1 from saved snapshots', and in one observed run the rerun finished without producing a latent ('Stage 1 rerun finished but latent was not produced'). Fix = re-stage (re-upload) the preview latent to the Pod AFTER an ephemeral-Pod engine restart, before stage-2 submit, so Continue reuses the exact preview latent instead of falling back. Remote-origin previews are unaffected (verified on MPI-89). App. See brief.md.
